reconcile_command: npm run docs:generate  (verify: npm run docs:check)

mechanisms.sentinel_regions: <!-- BEGIN generated:<key> --> .. <!-- END generated:<key> --> regions rewritten wholesale (issue-types, fields, filters, workflow, automation, staging-state, and new 'counts' table).
mechanisms.inline_count_tokens: <!--count:<key>-->N<!--/count--> spans inside authored prose; only N is rewritten from infra/, the surrounding sentence stays hand-written. Keys: managedIssueTypes, totalIssueTypes, customFields, filters, workflowStatuses, dashboards, seeds, automation.

left_as_authored_catalog_references.reason: enumerates a 14-item operator catalog (13 managed AIGO types + 'Bug / Tracking Issue' which maps to the builtin Bug, managed:false). This is the named catalog the operator types into the UI, not the live managed-flag count; tokenizing to 13 would contradict its own 14-item list.

left_as_authored_catalog_references.text: Configure the 14 issue types ... ; Board -> add 8 statuses
left_as_authored_catalog_references.reason: manual UI configuration steps referencing the canonical catalog (14 types) and the broader v2 status set (8 AIGO statuses), not the live infra workflow (3 platform statuses). Manual-procedure catalog references, not live-state assertions.
inside a ```bash code fence; inline HTML-comment tokens would render literally. Values are correct against infra/.

canonical_spec_vs_live_discrepancy.note: specs/v2/{issue-types,custom-fields,workflows}.md is a NOT-YET-ACCEPTED v2 re-homing proposal ('does not supersede current specs until accepted'). Per T-NIH-14, infra/jira/*.yaml is the live source of truth; the generator reads from infra/, not from the v2 specs.

deltas.explanation: v2 catalog counts 'Bug / Tracking Issue' as a 14th named type; in infra it is the builtin Bug (id 10061, managed:false), so the managed-flag count is 13. v2 issue-types.md drift table itself records 'generated tables: 13'.
v2 custom-fields.md proposes 39 re-homed field entities across JPD/Assets/Jira; infra/jira/fields.yaml declares 8 live custom fields. v2 model not yet provisioned.
v2 workflows.md proposes 11 statuses (3 platform default + 8 AIGO); live infra workflow 'AIGO Default' has the 3 platform-default statuses only (team-managed project).

canonical_spec_vs_live_discrepancy.resolution: Generator emits LIVE infra counts. The MVP_RUNBOOK 'counts' region and MVP_READINESS tables point readers to specs/v2/issue-types.md for the canonical-vs-live reconciliation rather than restating the proposal counts.

verification.docs_check: npm run docs:check -> exit 0 (docs in sync with infra/)
verification.drift_detection_proven: corrupting an inline token to 99 made docs:check report DRIFT (exit 3); docs:generate restored it to the infra value
